text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The hard work we've put in throughout spring and
summer bears fruit, and Manhattan Cafe breezes
through the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe feels the impact of our efforts
too, revealing that this is the closest she's ever
gotten to her friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't look the slightest bit unwell either.
Maybe our goal of reaching her friend is just a
race away... With our fingers crossed, we decide
to wrap up the year by taking on the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race is such a significant moment that it
attracts a fair share of senior-year runners—like
T.M. Opera O and Meisho Doto.
